name: python3-pylsqpack
title: python3-pylsqpack
summary: Python wrapper for the ls-qpack QPACK library
description:
Python wrapper for the ls-qpack QPACK library
Wrapper around the ls-qpack library. It provides Python Decoder and Encoder
objects to read or write HTTP/3 headers compressed with QPACK.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pylsqpack because Python wrapper for the ls-qpack QPACK library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pylsqpack as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pylsqpack with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pylsqpack --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
